entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, a legume crop constrained by plant-parasitic nematodes

entities.name: PLANT-PARASITIC NEMATODES
entities.description: Nematodes that constrain chickpea production and cause yield losses

entities.name: ROOT-KNOT NEMATODES
entities.description: Nematode species including Meloidogyne artiella, M. incognita, and M. javanica that cause economic damage to chickpea

entities.name: CYST NEMATODE
entities.description: Heterodera ciceri, a nematode species causing economic damage to chickpea

entities.name: ROOT-LESION NEMATODE
entities.description: Pratylenchus thornei, a nematode species causing economic damage to chickpea

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The total agricultural production of chickpea, which is reduced by nematode infestation

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A condition caused by reduced root functionality due to nematode infestation

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A condition caused by reduced root functionality due to nematode infestation

entities.name: NEMATODE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to withstand or limit the damage caused by plant-parasitic nematodes

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Management techniques integrated with resistant crops to control nematodes

entities.name: BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing chickpea cultivars with resistance to nematodes

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic variation within the C. arietinum cultigen

entities.name: WILD CICER SPECIES
entities.description: Wild relatives of chickpea that possess superior levels of nematode resistance

entities.name: INTERSPECIFIC HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: The process of crossing different species to introgress resistance genes

entities.name: C. RETICULATUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species of the primary genepool used to introgress resistance genes into chickpea

entities.name: C. ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species of the primary genepool used to introgress resistance genes into chickpea

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genetic elements that provide resistance to plant-parasitic nematodes

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Tools including genome sequences and reference sets used for chickpea improvement

entities.name: GENOME-ASSISTED BREEDING
entities.description: Strategies using genomic data to accelerate the introgression of nematode resistance
